title: yOS MPM Frontmatter Schema
description: YAML frontmatter schema for every Mega Prompt in the yOS MPM — Mega Prompt Manager (Inter-LLM Prompt Runtime & Relay System). JSON is the source of truth; MD frontmatter must be consistent with this schema. Patch: MP-COMMAND-CANON-V2-2026-07-04.

mpm_id.description: Unique packet identifier. Format: <PACKET_CODE>-YYYYMMDD-SLUG (e.g., MPM-20260704-RUNTIME-PACK, MPX-20260704-REVIEW)

packet_type.description: Packet type code. MP=generic, MPM=Manus, MPC=Claude, MPX=ChatGPT, MPG=Gemini, MPP=Perplexity. MPA is deprecated.

target_llm.description: Target LLM for this packet. Must be consistent with packet_type.

title.description: Human-readable title of the Mega Prompt

mode.description: Execution mode. sprint=fast/bounded, run=controlled, marathon=long-running coordinator+workers

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the packet

created_by.description: LLM or human that authored the packet (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Yannick)

executor.description: LLM or agent that will execute this packet (e.g., Manus, Claude)

guardian_required.description: Whether Guardian Architect review is required before archiving

source_scope.description: Which source corpora are in scope (e.g., kap-control-plane only, yos-cognitive-os, none)

forbidden_actions.description: Explicit list of forbidden actions for this packet

expected_outputs.description: List of expected output file paths

report_path.description: Path to the gate/execution report produced by this packet

execution_commit.description: Git commit hash in yos-cognitive-os after execution

control_plane_commit.description: Git commit hash in kap-control-plane after execution

supersedes.description: mpm_id of the packet this supersedes

superseded_by.description: mpm_id of the packet that supersedes this one

next_gate.description: Recommended next gate or packet after this one

risk_flags.description: Risk flags for auto-run safety check (Canon v2). If any flag is present, Manus must not auto-run and must trigger the exception handler.
